parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event_type: $json.source + '_' + $json.event_type, actor_id: $json.source.toUpperCase(), payload: $json.gabriel_alert || $json.ci_event || $json.lucy_action || $json.ledger_entry || $json.emergency || $json.alert || { type: $json.event_type }, sovereignty_check: $json.governance }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, source: $json.source, event_type: $json.event_type, governance: $json.governance?.cleared, id: $json._id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
